title: Rich Comfort Canadien Peanut Cookies Bake
description: A rich, pillowy, and comforting Canadian-inspired peanut cookies bake that is perfect for a sick day, featuring caramelize and gluten-free-friendly options.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a 9x13-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
In a large bowl, cream together the peanut butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract until well combined.
Gradually mix in the flour mixture until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Stir in the chocolate chips and caramel sauce.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the cookies from the baking dish.
Let the cookies cool completely in the baking dish before slicing into bars.
